ook_id":"6877775273685683214","book_info":{"abstract":"城市套路深，不如回农村，乡村小神医，妙手来治病。
大学生王大春遭人陷害，却因祸得福得到神医传承，从此远离城市的喧嚣，带领乡亲们发家致富，为村里修路，建学校，培植黄金鸡，种植草药，建工厂，盖别墅……
闲来钓钓鱼，看看病，遛遛狗，逗逗鸟，爬爬山，做做美食，和村花小姐姐谈谈恋爱，过上了人人羡慕的悠闲乡村生活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/59e3cf7ce2bac99cd2c3a7c7f58fb059","author":"一朵青莲","author_id":"","book_id":"6877775273685683214","book_name":"乡村神医","book_short_name":"盛开的黄土地","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6877779550021878286","read_count":"46682","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"6119285"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"3010","tags":"都市修真,都市,种田,神医,乡村","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9b33f5686b8046aef410598e89433339~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442386&x-signature=bF1GAOxQMeRnE379eyNpnNdkRtw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103215920912","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.5002636e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173306D4B505BFFAE4CA32AD77"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读154小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1317,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":3710,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":553734,"reply_count":16,"show_pv":16725 大学生王大春遭人陷害，却因祸得福得到神医传承，从此远离城市的喧嚣，带领乡亲们发家致富，为村里修路，建学校，培植黄金鸡，种植草药，建工厂，盖别墅……
闲来钓钓鱼，看看病，遛遛狗，逗逗鸟，爬爬山，做做美食，和村花小姐姐谈谈恋爱，过上了人人羡慕的悠闲乡村生活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/59e3cf7ce2bac99cd2c3a7c7f58fb059","author":"一朵青莲","author_id":"","book_id":"6877775273685683214","book_name":"乡村神医","book_short_name":"盛开的黄土地","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6877779550021878286","read_count":"46682","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"6119285"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"3010","tags":"都市修真,都市,种田,神医,乡村","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9b33f5686b8046aef410598e89433339~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442386&x-signature=bF1GAOxQMeRnE379eyNpnNdkRtw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103215920912","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.15891815e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173306D4B505BFFAE4CA32AD77"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读116小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":322,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":991,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":416881,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":20271},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6981662289053516576","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"乡音是人醉，村美是人痴，神仙仙景风光好，医者纯洁心。一代风娇子，朵朵花奇艳，青春年华金不换，莲玉荷更雅！
你急我也急，急有何用，君笔之下龙凤舞。迷倒褚位众先生。盼月盼星。作书真不易，若易同涌。一朵青莲乃天娇。乡村神医话生生。永留心中。
卜算子、赞
乡贵山俊奇，村美出娇婵，神笔之下有马良，医者去病疾。
一笔万千言，朵朵花艳丽，青春风光光无限，莲苞迷醉人。
2021年7月6日冯。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1625544929,"group_id":"6877775273685683214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzz1czULP1vOuYK4zmY+bos=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/mosaic-legacy/3793/3114521287~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795201&x-signature=fomg94pR1Q%2Fl14XT7JMMQ4UgxeM%3D","user_id":"108465279412","user_name":"冯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108465279412","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6877775273685683214","book_info":{"abstract":"城市套路深，不如回农村，乡村小神医，妙手来治病。
